title: EverReach Full-Funnel Ad — Drift is the Enemy
description: 45-60s UGC ad that transitions through the entire awareness funnel: Hook → Name Enemy → Mechanism → Proof → CTA

character.hair: short brown hair, slightly messy, natural
character.mannerisms: genuine, direct, relatable energy — like a smart friend giving advice

voice.tone: confident but empathetic, not salesy, real
voice.pace: conversational medium pace with natural pauses between thoughts
voice.quality: clear, warm, slightly intimate like talking to a close friend

setting: a cozy apartment, warm natural window light, lived-in feel, bookshelf and laptop visible in background

segments.voiceover: you are not bad at keeping up you are just running relationships on raw memory
segments.shotDescription: Selfie camera close-up, walking or sitting, relatable casual vibe

segments.voiceover: if you have ever thought I will reply later and then it has been three weeks that is not laziness that is drift
segments.shotDescription: Quick cut style, slightly different angle, leaning forward more intensely

segments.voiceover: drift is the enemy it quietly deletes friendships clients mentors and opportunities
segments.shotDescription: Hard cut to calm frame, looking directly into camera, serious expression

segments.voiceover: EverReach is a personal CRM for real life it turns relationships into a system so you stop relying on vibes and guilt
segments.shotDescription: Slight smile, leaning back, confident posture, explaining naturally

segments.voiceover: you add the people that matter EverReach helps you track who you have not talked to what you last discussed and who is warming up or cooling down
segments.shotDescription: Gesturing with hands while explaining, engaged energy, slight lean toward camera
segments.onScreenText: track warmth — know who needs you

segments.voiceover: so when you open your phone you do not guess you take one small action send the check in send the follow up keep the relationship alive
segments.shotDescription: More animated, nodding, building momentum, counting on fingers

segments.voiceover: download EverReach add your top five people today and let the system do the remembering
segments.shotDescription: Confident smile, slight forward lean, warm direct eye contact, ends with knowing nod
segments.onScreenText: download EverReach — add your top 5 today

ctaVariants.unaware-soft: follow for more on keeping your relationships alive link in bio
ctaVariants.problem-aware-challenge: add your top five people right now it takes thirty seconds try it
ctaVariants.product-aware-direct: download EverReach right now free trial no credit card link in bio
